Advent Additional Armor.name: Additional Armor
Advent Additional Armor.description: Adds additional armor and hull to the Eradica.

Advent Antimatter Phase Jump Panels.name: Antimatter Phase Jump Panels
Advent Antimatter Phase Jump Panels.description: Phase jumping will generate a massive amount of antimatter to be restored when the jump is finished.
Advent Antimatter Phase Jump Panels.ability: Advent Hyperspace Antimatter Recharger Unit Item

Advent Antimatter Pod.name: Antimatter Pod
Advent Antimatter Pod.description: Passively increases antimatter regeneration rate. Can be activated to restore antimatter points over a short duration.

Advent Area Shield.name: Area Shield
Advent Area Shield.description: The Transcencia extends its own shield to cover all nearby friendly structures, absorbing a portion of the damage that they would have received.

Advent Brilliance Array.name: Brilliance Array
Advent Brilliance Array.description: An advanced PsiTech device that channels the mental energy of the crews into the power systems of nearby allied vessels, increasing antimatter regeneration for all nearby ships based on the psi power of the ship this item is fitted to.

Advent Consecration Inducer.name: Consecration Inducer
Advent Consecration Inducer.description: An intricate, PsiTech energy adapter designed to channel the euphoric energy of the crew directly into the shield generator, restoring shield points based on the psi power of the crew.

Advent Coronata Beams.name: Coronata Beams
Advent Coronata Beams.description: Adds beam weapons to the Coronata.

Advent Deploy Transcencia Starbase.name: Deploy Transcencia Starbase
Advent Deploy Transcencia Starbase.description: Allows you to deploy a starbase at foreign gravity wells.

Advent Energy Accelerator.name: Energy Accelerator
Advent Energy Accelerator.description: Advanced field control technology is used to contain and accelerate the bolts and beams of all energy weapons, enhancing range and damage.

Advent Eradica Plasma.name: Eradica Plasma
Advent Eradica Plasma.description: Adds plasma weapons to the Eradica.

Advent Eradica Swarm Missiles.name: Eradica Swarm Missiles
Advent Eradica Swarm Missiles.description: Adds swarm missiles to the Eradica.

Advent Essence Reservoir.name: Essence Reservoir
Advent Essence Reservoir.description: This PsiTech device uses the grace of the purified Unity to capture the souls from the crews of nearby friendly ships when they are destroyed, granting a stacking bonus to psi power.

Advent Evangelization Nodes.name: Evangelization Nodes
Advent Evangelization Nodes.description: Spreads the cultural influence of your empire to nearby planets.

Advent Final Judgment.name: Final Judgment
Advent Final Judgment.description: Many telekinetically propelled meteors strike the planet, causing massive damage.

Advent Guiding Mentor.name: Guiding Mentor
Advent Guiding Mentor.description: Grant a bonus to experience earned by friendly ships that are lower in level within the same gravity well.

Advent Harmony Circuit.name: Harmony Circuit
Advent Harmony Circuit.description: Increases psi power. Can be activated to increase the psi power of the targeted friendly ship.

Advent Kinetic Surge Missiles.name: Kinetic Surge Missiles
Advent Kinetic Surge Missiles.description: Psionically enhanced warheads maintain their lethality over a greater distance, allowing missiles to deal area of effect damage.

Advent Kinetic Surge Warheads.name: Kinetic Surge Warheads
Advent Kinetic Surge Warheads.description: Allows swarm missiles to deal area of effect damage.

Advent Lethargy.name: Lethargy
Advent Lethargy.description: Telepathic psintegrats instill a sense of lethargy into hostile crews, causing all enemy units in the gravity well to suffer reduced speed.

Advent Malefic Locus.name: Malefic Locus
Advent Malefic Locus.description: A sinister PsiTech amplifier that augments the damage dealing potential of abilities used by the Justicia.

Advent Meteor Storm.name: Meteor Storm
Advent Meteor Storm.description: Bombards enemy ships within a radius of the target with telekinetically thrown meteoroids, causing immense damage.

Advent Mind Locus.name: Mind Locus
Advent Mind Locus.description: An enigmatic PsiTech amplifier that augments the support potential of abilities used by the Justicia.

Advent Planetary Shield Array.name: Planetary Shield Array
Advent Planetary Shield Array.description: Projects a defensive shield around the gravity well's planet, preventing damage to the surface while the shield is active.

Advent Plasma Agitator.name: Plasma Agitator
Advent Plasma Agitator.description: Rotating magnetic fields are used to agitate plasma into an even higher energy state prior to firing, increasing damage for plasma weapons and planetary bombardment.

Advent Plasma Nova Generator.name: Plasma Nova Generator
Advent Plasma Nova Generator.description: Passively increases plasma weapon damage while equipped. Can be activated to inflict damage over time on all nearby enemy ships within range.

Advent Psi Projector.name: Psi Projector
Advent Psi Projector.description: PsiTech emitters allow adepts to project their Psi Power to all units and structures in the gravity well.

Advent PsiKinetic Plating.name: PsiKinetic Plating
Advent PsiKinetic Plating.description: This PsiTech armor is hardened by telekinetic fields, improving armor strength based on the psi power of the crews.

Advent Psionic Dynamo.name: Psionic Dynamo
Advent Psionic Dynamo.description: Each time this ship uses an ability, the crew gains a stacking bonus to psi power for a moderate duration.

Advent Psionic Shield.name: Psionic Shield
Advent Psionic Shield.description: Greatly improve starbase shields. When activated, telekinetic fields will further reduce incoming damage.

Advent Savior Locus.name: Savior Locus
Advent Savior Locus.description: A resolute PsiTech amplifier that augments the defensive potential of abilities used by the Justicia.

Advent Shield Battery.name: Shield Battery
Advent Shield Battery.description: Passively increases shield regeneration. Can be activated to restore shield points over a short duration.

Advent Shield Booster.name: Shield Booster
Advent Shield Booster.description: Adds additional shield points to the Eradica.

Advent Starbase Plasma.name: Starbase Plasma
Advent Starbase Plasma.description: Add a full array of heavy plasma turrets to this starbase.

Advent Starbase Swarm Missiles.name: Starbase Swarm Missiles
Advent Starbase Swarm Missiles.description: Add a full array of swarm missile launchers to this starbase.

Advent Structural Force Fields.name: Structural Force Fields
Advent Structural Force Fields.description: Advanced failsafe force fields are installed in order to rapidly close hull breaches and hold the ship together when it suffers extreme damage.

Advent Synchronous Shield.name: Synchronous Shield
Advent Synchronous Shield.description: Secondary shield generators can be brought into alignment to generate positive harmonic frequencies, increasing shield points and shield burst magnitude.

Advent Telepathic Amplifier.name: Telepathic Amplifier
Advent Telepathic Amplifier.description:
This arcane device empowers the telepathic potential of the Unity when in the presence of a star, allowing the Advent to reach into the minds of planetary populations across the entire system. 

Construct three Telepathic Amplifiers on Command Ships, then bring them all to a Star to begin gathering psionic energy for the Mass Conversion. 

Successfully keeping all three Telepathic Amplifier equipped command ships alive long enough to gather psionic energy will result in victory!

Advent Telepathic Guidance Amp.name: Telepathic Guidance Amp
Advent Telepathic Guidance Amp.description: Allows this unit to remotely summon all types of ships directly from other Advent invasion fleets.

Advent Vex Amplifier.name: Vex Amplifier
Advent Vex Amplifier.description: This PsiTech emitter is powered by the hatred and rage of the crew, improving weapon rate of fire based on the psi power of the crew.

Advent Votary Siphon.name: Votary Siphon
Advent Votary Siphon.description: Passively increases psi power. Can be activated to greatly increase psi power over a short duration.

Advent Zealous Labor.name: Zealous Labor
Advent Zealous Labor.description: Psionic adepts aboard the starbase influence the populace of the gravity well's planet to tirelessly increase resource production.

Alutar Sect Safeguard Shield.name: Safeguard Shield
Alutar Sect Safeguard Shield.description: Advanced modular shield capacitors of Alutar design can be installed into any shield generator to enable and enhance burst restoration.

Alutar Sect Vigor Engine.name: Vigor Engine
Alutar Sect Vigor Engine.description: An arcane, self contained reactor module that generates a steady flow of Antimatter for use in ship systems. Crew assigned to monitor the device often report feeling unusually refreshed after completing their duties.

Aluxian Resurgence Aluxian Admiral-Scion.name: Aluxian Admiral-Scion
Aluxian Resurgence Aluxian Admiral-Scion.description: Some members of the Aluxi family chose to lead from the front line, becoming skilled military leaders with many decades of experience.

Aluxian Resurgence Aluxian Military Obse.name: Aluxian Military Observers
Aluxian Resurgence Aluxian Military Obse.description: Veteran officers of the Aluxi Dynasty's royal guard who act as observers on a capital ship.

Ancient Antimatter Pulse Wave.name: Antimatter Pulse Wave
Ancient Antimatter Pulse Wave.description: The starbase disrupts magnetic containment fields in an area, causing a portion of the antimatter onboard ships to violently react, spreading damage to nearby ships.
Ancient Antimatter Pulse Wave.ability: Dlc Ancient Starbase Antimatter Pulse Wave

Ancient Heavy Weapon Reconstruction.name: Heavy Weapon Reconstruction
Ancient Heavy Weapon Reconstruction.description: Restores functionality to the derelict tachyon lance and phase cannon weaponry on the Ancient Starbase.

Ancient Light Weapon Reconstruction.name: Light Weapon Reconstruction
Ancient Light Weapon Reconstruction.description: Restores functionality to the derelict particle cannon and point defense beam weaponry on the Ancient Starbase.

Ancient Missile Reconstruction.name: Missile Reconstruction
Ancient Missile Reconstruction.description: Restores functionality to the derelict missile weaponry on the Ancient Starbase.

Ancient Phase Jump Inhibitor.name: Phase Jump Inhibitor
Ancient Phase Jump Inhibitor.description: Interferes with the phase drives of enemy ships within the gravity well, preventing them from jumping away.

Ancient Planetary Shield Array.name: Planetary Shield Array
Ancient Planetary Shield Array.description: Projects a defensive shield around your planet preventing damage to the surface while the shield persists.
Ancient Planetary Shield Array.ability: Dlc Ancient Starbase Planetary Shield Array

Ancient Shield Leech.name: Shield Leech
Ancient Shield Leech.description: The starbase generates an energy flow field, stealing shields from nearby enemy ships to restore its own.

Ancient Singularity Portal.name: Singularity Portal
Ancient Singularity Portal.description: Creates a zone of space linked to a far away black hole, pulling enemy units towards its center, reducing max speed and disabling their phase drives.

Artifact Exoforce Matrix.name: Exoforce Matrix
Artifact Exoforce Matrix.description: An intricate crystalline lattice capable of storing immense energy. Mysterious radiant energy is regularly given off by the device, hastening the ship's ability cooldowns.

Artifact Kinetic Intensifier.name: Kinetic Intensifier
Artifact Kinetic Intensifier.description: Powerful quantum accelerator technology slightly increases the range and damage of all your weapons within the gravity well.

Artifact Mass Negation Core.name: Mass Negation Core
Artifact Mass Negation Core.description: This containment device houses exotic matter capable of reducing the mass of nearby ships, allowing them to maneuver more effectively than normal.

Artifact Power Core Relic.name: Power Core Relic
Artifact Power Core Relic.description: A power source left behind by an ancient race, it significantly increases antimatter capacity and regeneration rates for your units within the gravity well.

Artifact Resilient Metalloids.name: Resilient Metalloids
Artifact Resilient Metalloids.description: A previously undiscovered compound grants quickened hull repair rates and increased armor when incorporated into hull plating.

Artifact Weapon Symbiote.name: Weapon Symbiote
Artifact Weapon Symbiote.description: A flexible metalloid device designed by an ancient civilization, whose sole purpose appears to be to augment weapon systems. When attached, it will automatically decipher the weapon's function and improve its firing capability.

Jiskun Force Colony Seed Nanites.name: Colony Seed Nanites
Jiskun Force Colony Seed Nanites.description: Versatile nanites bred by the Jiskun Expeditionary Force to allow any capital ship to Colonize a planet at an augmented level.

Nilari Cult Frenzy Circuit.name: Frenzy Circuit
Nilari Cult Frenzy Circuit.description: Nilari energy exchange technology allows shield power to be redirected, temporarily boosting weapon recharge and reload times.

Pirate Boarding Crew.name: Boarding Crew
Pirate Boarding Crew.description: Adds several pirate boarding crews to your ship. These crews can board and take control of enemy corvettes, frigates and cruisers.

Pirate Looting Crew.name: Looting Crew
Pirate Looting Crew.description: Adds a pirate looting crew to your ship. All weapon damage will generate credits.

Pranast United Armored Citadel.name: Armored Citadel
Pranast United Armored Citadel.description: Advanced armor plates designed by the Pranast United are installed near the ship's command center and engines, ensuring it can survive extreme damage even when crippled.

Pranast United Bastion Module.name: Bastion Module
Pranast United Bastion Module.description: Modular starbase technology developed by the Pranast United to greatly increase hull and armor points.

TEC Ablative Armor.name: Ablative Armor
TEC Ablative Armor.description: Advanced armor plating designed to ablate into clouds of coherance disrupting particles when struck by a beam is fitted in key areas of the ship.

TEC Additional Shield Generator.name: Additional Shield Generator
TEC Additional Shield Generator.description: An additional shield generator is installed aboard the starbase and rigged to come online rapidly whenever the main generator fails. Grants shield burst to starbases with this item.
TEC Additional Shield Generator.ability: Trader Starbase Additional Shield Generator Unit Item

TEC Advanced Missile Refit.name: Advanced Missile Refit
TEC Advanced Missile Refit.description: Replaces the Takadaran's cargo pods with advanced missile batteries.

TEC Ankylon Beams.name: Ankylon Beams
TEC Ankylon Beams.description: Adds a full array of beam weapons to the Ankylon.

TEC Ankylon Hangar.name: Ankylon Hangar
TEC Ankylon Hangar.description: Gives the Ankylon a complement of strikecraft squadrons.

TEC Ankylon Missile Batteries.name: Ankylon Missile Batteries
TEC Ankylon Missile Batteries.description: Adds a full array of missile weapons to the Ankylon.

TEC Ankylon Planetary Shield Array.name: Ankylon Planetary Shield Array
TEC Ankylon Planetary Shield Array.description: Projects a defensive shield around your planet preventing damage to the surface while the shield remains.
TEC Ankylon Planetary Shield Array.ability: Trader Loyalist Titan Planetary Shield Array

TEC Antimatter Engine.name: Antimatter Engine
TEC Antimatter Engine.description: Passively boosts the maximum antimatter and recharge rate of the ship. Can be used to give a fixed amount of antimatter.

TEC Argonev Planetary Shield Array.name: Argonev Planetary Shield Array
TEC Argonev Planetary Shield Array.description: Projects a defensive shield around your planet preventing damage to the surface while the shield remains.

TEC Armor Patch Kit.name: Armor Patch Kit
TEC Armor Patch Kit.description: Patches up armor damage, even in combat.

TEC Armored Citadel.name: Armored Citadel
TEC Armored Citadel.description: Advanced armor plates designed by the Pranast United are installed near the ship's command center and engines, ensuring it can survive extreme damage even when crippled.

TEC Backup Shield Generator.name: Backup Shield Generator
TEC Backup Shield Generator.description: A secondary shield generator is installed aboard the ship and rigged to come online rapidly whenever the main generator fails. Grants shield burst to ships with this item.
TEC Backup Shield Generator.ability: Trader Backup Shield Generator Unit Item

TEC Bastion Module.name: Bastion Module
TEC Bastion Module.description: Modular starbase technology developed by the Pranast United to greatly increase hull and armor points.

TEC Beam Turrets.name: Beam Turrets
TEC Beam Turrets.description: Equips the Khevarkov with advanced beam turrets.

TEC Cargo: Antimatter Reserves.name: Cargo: Antimatter Reserves
TEC Cargo: Antimatter Reserves.description: Fits the Takadaran's cargo pods with antimatter containment systems and fuel line feeds.

TEC Cargo: Factory Supplies.name: Cargo: Factory Supplies
TEC Cargo: Factory Supplies.description: Stocks the Takadaran's cargo pods with supplies used in ship construction.
TEC Cargo: Factory Supplies.ability: Dlc2 Trader Loyalist Super Capital Ship Factory Supplies

TEC Combat Repair System.name: Combat Repair System
TEC Combat Repair System.description: Grants a passive bonus to repair rates that persists in combat. Can be activated to boost this repair rate for a short duration.
TEC Combat Repair System.ability: Trader Combat Repair System Unit Item

TEC Construction Bays.name: Construction Bays
TEC Construction Bays.description: Large-scale manufacturing facilities are built, allowing the starbase to construct frigate, corvette and cruiser class ships.

TEC Core Systems Armor.name: Core Systems Armor
TEC Core Systems Armor.description: Extensive armored subdivision of the ship's internal structure significantly improves its ability to withstand damage.

TEC Defense Grid Command Center.name: Defense Grid Command Center
TEC Defense Grid Command Center.description: Advanced sensors and communication grids aboard the starbase allow all armed structures in the gravity well to fight more effectively.

TEC Deploy Argonev Starbase.name: Deploy Argonev Starbase
TEC Deploy Argonev Starbase.description: Allows you to deploy a starbase at foreign gravity wells.

TEC Derelict Specialist Team.name: Derelict Specialist Team
TEC Derelict Specialist Team.description: Reduces the time to fully inspect derelicts. Will also provide a bonus to experience gained.

TEC Docking Booms.name: Docking Booms
TEC Docking Booms.description: Allows the starbase to repair and refill the antimatter reserves of nearby friendly forces.

TEC Exotics Salvage Policy.name: Exotics Salvage Policy
TEC Exotics Salvage Policy.description: Insures the capital ship so that the Exotics used in its manufacture are automatically recovered in the event the ship is destroyed.
TEC Exotics Salvage Policy.ability: Trader Capital Ship Insurance Unit Item

TEC Flak Burst.name: Flak Burst
TEC Flak Burst.description: Fragmentation ordnance is launched and detonated nearby, dealing physical damage to all strikecraft and missiles within a short range.

TEC Flak Field.name: Flak Field
TEC Flak Field.description: Oversized fragmentation ordnance is launched and detonated near the starbase, dealing physical damage to all strikecraft and missiles within a long range.

TEC Gauss Turrets.name: Gauss Turrets
TEC Gauss Turrets.description: Equips the Khevarkov with gauss turrets.

TEC Heavy Gauss Slugs.name: Heavy Gauss Slugs
TEC Heavy Gauss Slugs.description: Metallurgical advances grant Gauss weapons increased damage.

TEC High Yield Warheads.name: High Yield Warheads
TEC High Yield Warheads.description: Increases planet bombing damage. Can be activated to increase the bombing damage of all nearby units.
TEC High Yield Warheads.ability: Trader High Yield Warheads Unit Item

TEC Ion Torpedo Barrage.name: Ion Torpedo Barrage
TEC Ion Torpedo Barrage.description: Fire a salvo of Ion Torpedoes at the target, disabling all targets in an area upon impact.

TEC Manufacturing Support.name: Manufacturing Support
TEC Manufacturing Support.description: Prefabricated ship parts are constantly manufactured and shipped to all factories in the gravity well, improving ship build rates.

TEC Missile Guidance Computer.name: Missile Guidance Computer
TEC Missile Guidance Computer.description: Enables missile retargeting and grants a bonus damage to missiles fired by friendly units within range.
TEC Missile Guidance Computer.ability: Trader Missile Guidance Computer Unit Item

TEC Missile Turrets.name: Missile Turrets
TEC Missile Turrets.description: Equips the Khevarkov with heavy missile turrets.

TEC Modular Advanced Missiles.name: Modular Advanced Missiles
TEC Modular Advanced Missiles.description: Equips the Khevarkov with advanced missile launchers.

TEC Modular Launch Bays.name: Modular Launch Bays
TEC Modular Launch Bays.description: Equip the Khevarkov with launch bays to greatly expand its strikecraft complement.

TEC Modular Railguns.name: Modular Railguns
TEC Modular Railguns.description: Equips the Khevarkov with a pair of railguns.

TEC Novalith Targeting Computer.name: Novalith Targeting Computer
TEC Novalith Targeting Computer.description: Extends the range of the Novalith Cannon.

TEC Planet Cracker Warheads.name: Planet Cracker Warheads
TEC Planet Cracker Warheads.description:
This supremely powerful Novalith warhead is optimised to drill through a planetary crust before detonating a massive antimatter warhead. The resultant chain reaction rapidly and violently destroys the planet. 

Construct Planet Cracker Warheads on a Novalith Cannon, then destroy planets with it to prove the destructiveness of the weapon. The planet must be brought to zero health by the Planet Cracker Warhead to be destroyed. 

Successfully destroying five planets and keeping the Planet Cracker Warhead equipped Novalith alive will result in victory!

TEC Radiation Bomb.name: Radiation Bomb
TEC Radiation Bomb.description: Fires a radioactive shell at the targeted enemy ship, causing it and nearby enemies to be dealt damage over time for a short duration.

TEC Ragnarov Hangar.name: Ragnarov Hangar
TEC Ragnarov Hangar.description: Gives the Ragnarov a complement of strikecraft squadrons.

TEC Ragnarov Missile Launchers.name: Ragnarov Missile Launchers
TEC Ragnarov Missile Launchers.description: Adds a full array of missile weapons to the Ragnarov.

TEC Ragnarov Railgun Accelerator.name: Ragnarov Railgun Accelerator
TEC Ragnarov Railgun Accelerator.description: Upgrades the railgun's power system and rail materials to increase the magnetic field strength driving its projectiles. Also improves its Piercing Shot ability.

TEC Rapid Autoloader.name: Rapid Autoloader
TEC Rapid Autoloader.description: Increases the reload rate of physical weapons. Can be used to briefly overcharge the cooldown reduction.

TEC Reactive Plating.name: Reactive Plating
TEC Reactive Plating.description: Additional armor plating designed to reactively counter the impact of incoming missiles is added to vital areas of the ship.

TEC Reserve Squadron Hangar.name: Reserve Squadron Hangar
TEC Reserve Squadron Hangar.description: Increases the maximum squadrons this ship can support. Can be used to instantly replenish destroyed strikecraft.
TEC Reserve Squadron Hangar.ability: Trader Reserve Squadron Hangar Unit Item

TEC Safety Override Protocol.name: Safety Override Protocol
TEC Safety Override Protocol.description: Engineering crews override all safety protocols, causing the starbase's central reactor to go supercritical. The resulting explosion destroys the starbase and does immense damage to all objects within the blast area.

TEC Sector Communications Array.name: Sector Communications Array
TEC Sector Communications Array.description: Allows this ship to remotely summon all types of ships directly from other TEC sector fleets.

TEC Starbase Beams.name: Starbase Beams
TEC Starbase Beams.description: Adds a full array of beam weapons to this starbase.

TEC Starbase Missile Launchers.name: Starbase Missile Launchers
TEC Starbase Missile Launchers.description: Adds a full array of missile launchers to this starbase.

TEC Tactical Analyst.name: Tactical Analyst
TEC Tactical Analyst.description: Provides a bonus to all experience gained by observing and analyzing combat.

TEC Targeting Array.name: Targeting Array
TEC Targeting Array.description: Greatly increases the weapons' range of this ship. Will also increase the weapons' range of all nearby ships to a lesser extent.

TEC Trade Facilities.name: Trade Facilities
TEC Trade Facilities.description: Large cargo handling bays allow the starbase to act as a trade hub, providing additional Export Points.

TEC Volatile Accelerants.name: Volatile Accelerants
TEC Volatile Accelerants.description: Potent fuel additives greatly boost the speed of your nearby ships for a short time, but their unstable nature causes damage over the duration.

TEC War Reporter.name: War Reporter
TEC War Reporter.description: A war journalist and their media team are embedded with the crew of the capital ship in order to capture footage for propaganda films extolling the might of the TEC.

Vasari Antimatter Recharger.name: Antimatter Recharger
Vasari Antimatter Recharger.description: Boosts the antimatter recharge rate of the ship.

Vasari Beam Modulator.name: Beam Modulator
Vasari Beam Modulator.description: Separate in execution, but similar in theory to ongoing research into wave cannon modulation, advanced modulation of the waves constituting each beam results in increased damage.

Vasari Charged Phase Missile Salvo.name: Charged Phase Missile Salvo
Vasari Charged Phase Missile Salvo.description: Charges up a salvo of Phase Missiles to greatly augment their capabilities.

Vasari Debris Reintegration.name: Debris Reintegration
Vasari Debris Reintegration.description: Restores the hull and armor of the Orkulus by a proportion of the hull points of nearby destroyed units.

Vasari Departure Supplies.name: Departure Supplies
Vasari Departure Supplies.description:
There are enough resources in this enormous hoard to supply the Dark Fleet for the next phase of its ten-thousand year interstellar journey, allowing them to escape from war and the sinister unknown force that pursues them. 

Construct three Departure Supplies on Command Ships, then bring them all to a Star to begin charging phase drives for The Departure. 

Successfully keeping all three Departure Supply equipped command ships alive long enough to charge their phase drives will result in victory!

Vasari Deploy Orkulus Starbase.name: Deploy Orkulus Starbase
Vasari Deploy Orkulus Starbase.description: Allows you to deploy a starbase at foreign gravity wells.

Vasari Deploy Phase Gate.name: Deploy Phase Gate
Vasari Deploy Phase Gate.description: Allows you to deploy a Phase Gate at a foreign gravity well.

Vasari Deploy Phase Resonator.name: Deploy Phase Resonator
Vasari Deploy Phase Resonator.description: Allows you to deploy a Phase Resonator at a foreign gravity well.

Vasari Efficient Hangars I.name: Efficient Hangars I
Vasari Efficient Hangars I.description: Increases the number of strikecraft the Orkulus can maintain.

Vasari Efficient Hangars II.name: Efficient Hangars II
Vasari Efficient Hangars II.description: Increases the number of strikecraft the Orkulus can maintain.

Vasari Efficient Hangars III.name: Efficient Hangars III
Vasari Efficient Hangars III.description: Increases the number of strikecraft the Orkulus can maintain.

Vasari Enhanced Nano Emitters.name: Enhanced Nano Emitters
Vasari Enhanced Nano Emitters.description: Improves the radius of effect of Nano Leech and Nano Remit.

Vasari Exodus Supplies.name: Exodus Supplies
Vasari Exodus Supplies.description: The remnants of your fleet are forced to drop into Trader space to replenish your dwindling resources. Exodus supplies provide the necessary resources to establish your transitory empire and will be consumed upon colonization.

Vasari Gravity Pulse Enhancer.name: Gravity Pulse Enhancer
Vasari Gravity Pulse Enhancer.description: Improves of the radius of effect of Gravity Pulse.

Vasari Gravity Stabilizer.name: Gravity Stabilizer
Vasari Gravity Stabilizer.description: This advanced system stabilizes and normalizes gravity in the vicinity of the ship, allowing it to achieve greater speeds.

Vasari Inertial Anchor.name: Inertial Anchor
Vasari Inertial Anchor.description: Slows the movement of nearby enemy missiles and fighters.

Vasari Intelligent Armor I.name: Intelligent Armor I
Vasari Intelligent Armor I.description: A layer of nanites dynamically modifies the material properties of the starbase's hull in order to maximize protection against specific threats. Grants increased hull strength and armor.

Vasari Intelligent Armor II.name: Intelligent Armor II
Vasari Intelligent Armor II.description: A layer of nanites dynamically modifies the material properties of the starbase's hull in order to maximize protection against specific threats. Grants increased hull strength and armor.

Vasari Intelligent Armor III.name: Intelligent Armor III
Vasari Intelligent Armor III.description: A layer of nanites dynamically modifies the material properties of the starbase's hull in order to maximize protection against specific threats. Grants increased hull strength and armor.

Vasari Kultorask Hangar Expansion.name: Kultorask Hangar Expansion
Vasari Kultorask Hangar Expansion.description: Increases the number of strikecraft squadrons available to the Kultorask.

Vasari Kultorask Phase Cannon.name: Kultorask Phase Cannon
Vasari Kultorask Phase Cannon.description: Unlocks the titan's phase cannon weapon capabilities.

Vasari Kultorask Phase Missile Launchers.name: Kultorask Phase Missile Launchers
Vasari Kultorask Phase Missile Launchers.description: Adds supplemental phase missile launchers to the Kultorask.

Vasari Micro Phase Jump Enhancer.name: Micro Phase Jump Enhancer
Vasari Micro Phase Jump Enhancer.description: Enemies damaged by Micro Phase Jump's arrival effect now suffer a weapon reload rate penalty for a short duration.

Vasari Mobile Adjunct Lab.name: Mobile Adjunct Lab
Vasari Mobile Adjunct Lab.description: Onboard data relays and support labs increase the speed of all research conducted by the Vasari Exodus fleet.

Vasari Mobile Empire Lab.name: Mobile Empire Lab
Vasari Mobile Empire Lab.description: This onboard holding facility ensures the Vasari Exodus fleet always has live subjects to test genetic, social and nanotech advances on.

Vasari Mobile Exotic Refinery.name: Mobile Exotic Refinery
Vasari Mobile Exotic Refinery.description: Allows your ships to forge exotics while traveling through space.

Vasari Mobile Fleet Beacon.name: Mobile Fleet Beacon
Vasari Mobile Fleet Beacon.description: Allows this ship to remotely summon all types of ships directly from the Dark Fleet.

Vasari Mobile Research Complex.name: Mobile Research Complex
Vasari Mobile Research Complex.description: A massive series of connected research facilities constructed within the Vorastra serve to coordinate Exodus scientific efforts, even when the fleet is on the move.

Vasari Mobile Resonance Capacitor.name: Mobile Resonance Capacitor
Vasari Mobile Resonance Capacitor.description: Permanently collects Phase Resonance, storing it in this item as long as it remains alive.

Vasari Mobile Warfare Lab.name: Mobile Warfare Lab
Vasari Mobile Warfare Lab.description: A specialized onboard lab designed to safely isolate high energy field tests and hostile nanite culturing.

Vasari Mobile Xeno Embassy.name: Mobile Xeno Embassy
Vasari Mobile Xeno Embassy.description: Reception halls and quick access cargo bays left over from the Sularkon Tyrant's historical purpose as a mobile center of governance are easily repurposed for use when interacting with minor factions.

Vasari Nano Attack Swarm.name: Nano Attack Swarm
Vasari Nano Attack Swarm.description: A swarm of nanites damage the targeted enemy and then continue to damage it over time by tearing its hull apart atom by atom before running out of power.

Vasari Nano Catalyzer Swarm.name: Nano Catalyzer Swarm
Vasari Nano Catalyzer Swarm.description: Energized nanites rapidly restore the antimatter of the targeted ally unit even during combat.
Vasari Nano Catalyzer Swarm.ability: Vasari Nano Antimatter Restore Unit Item

Vasari Nano Repair Swarm.name: Nano Repair Swarm
Vasari Nano Repair Swarm.description: Nanites repair the hull or armor of the targeted ally unit and are resilient enough to perform their task during combat.
Vasari Nano Repair Swarm.ability: Vasari Nano Repair Kit Unit Item

Vasari Orkulus Phase Jump Drive.name: Orkulus Phase Jump Drive
Vasari Orkulus Phase Jump Drive.description: Allows the Orkulus starbase to phase jump to adjacent gravity wells.

Vasari Phase Attenuated Shield.name: Phase Attenuated Shield
Vasari Phase Attenuated Shield.description: Extending the inner edge of the ship's shield into phase space provides the ability to temporarily block phase missile attacks.

Vasari Phase Gate Restoration.name: Phase Gate Restoration
Vasari Phase Gate Restoration.description: Restores the Sularkon Tyrant's onboard Phase Gate to functionality, providing phase stabilization at the Tyrant's location.\n\nWhen the Sularkon Tyrant jumps to another gravity well, it will leave behind a temporary phase stabilization wake for a short time.
Vasari Phase Gate Restoration.ability: Dlc2 Vasari Rebel Super Capital Ship Phase Gate

Vasari Phase Missile Augments.name: Phase Missile Augments
Vasari Phase Missile Augments.description: Warhead launchers and targeting systems are customized specifically for this ship, improving the damage of all phase missiles.

Vasari Phase Missile Restoration.name: Phase Missile Restoration
Vasari Phase Missile Restoration.description: Additional phase missile launchers are installed in the starbase to increase its firepower.

Vasari Phasic Comms Net Restoration.name: Phasic Comms Net Restoration
Vasari Phasic Comms Net Restoration.description: Restoring the phasic communication circuits built into the structure of the Sularkon Tyrant allows it spread culture.
Vasari Phasic Comms Net Restoration.ability: Dlc2 Vasari Rebel Super Capital Ship Phasic Comms Net

Vasari Planetary Shield Array.name: Planetary Shield Array
Vasari Planetary Shield Array.description: Projects a defensive shield around your planet, preventing damage to the surface while the shield is maintained.

Vasari Resonance Amplifier.name: Resonance Amplifier
Vasari Resonance Amplifier.description: An onboard system that allows a ship to amplify and extend the duration of Resonance effects.

Vasari Self-Repairing Armor.name: Self-Repairing Armor
Vasari Self-Repairing Armor.description: Experimental nanites being developed for use across the fleet are installed to enable armor regeneration while in combat, and rapidly restore armor capacity in an emergency. This will also help provide valuable data for much more scalable systems of self-repair.

Vasari Strikecraft Armor.name: Strikecraft Armor
Vasari Strikecraft Armor.description: With a limited population, the Vasari are desperate to improve the lifespan of all strikecraft pilots hosted by this ship. As a result, custom armor is developed and retrofitted onto each craft.

Vasari The Maw Enhancer.name: The Maw Enhancer
Vasari The Maw Enhancer.description: The Maw now adds a stacking buff to titan's weapon damage for each ship consumed.

Vasari Unstable Wave Cannons.name: Unstable Wave Cannons
Vasari Unstable Wave Cannons.description: Shots fired by unstable wave cannons have a chance to detonate on impact, dealing area damage and briefly slowing all targets caught in the blast radius.

Vasari Vask Tacticians.name: Vask Tacticians
Vasari Vask Tacticians.description: Largely responsible for the most effective Vasari assaults, the Vask wing deploys specialist teams to flagships on critical fronts for advanced training.

Vasari Vorastra Hangar.name: Vorastra Hangar
Vasari Vorastra Hangar.description: Gives the Vorastra a complement of strikecraft squadrons.

Vasari Vorastra Phase Cannon.name: Vorastra Phase Cannon
Vasari Vorastra Phase Cannon.description: Unlocks the titan's phase cannon weapon capabilities.

Vasari Vorastra Super Heavy Wave Cannons.name: Vorastra Super Heavy Wave Cannons
Vasari Vorastra Super Heavy Wave Cannons.description: Adds a full array of Super Heavy Wave weapons to the Vorastra.

Vasari Wave Cannon Restoration.name: Wave Cannon Restoration
Vasari Wave Cannon Restoration.description: Additional wave cannons are mounted on the starbase to increase its firepower.

Vasari Wave Modulator.name: Wave Modulator
Vasari Wave Modulator.description: Before launching, waves are modulated to maintain a more consistent and stable waveform, increasing the damage of all wave cannons.

Viturak Cabal Deploy Phase Gate.name: Deploy Phase Gate
Viturak Cabal Deploy Phase Gate.description: Allows you to deploy a Phase Gate at a foreign gravity well.

Viturak Cabal Emergency Phase Shifter.name: Emergency Phase Shifter
Viturak Cabal Emergency Phase Shifter.description: A powerful item that will temporary phase shift a ship. The targeted unit will not be able to attack or be attacked for a short duration.

Viturak Cabal Jump Field Stabilizer.name: Jump Field Stabilizer
Viturak Cabal Jump Field Stabilizer.description: An advanced phase drive module that renders the ship immune to the effects of Phase Jump Inhibitors.
